center.name: 朗布隆省
center.summary: 朗布隆省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Streak-breasted bulbul、Magnificent sunbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines found in the Visayan islands of Negros Island, Panay, Cebu, Tablas Island and Romblon

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines found in the Visayas on the islands of Tablas Island, Siquijor, Cebu and Romblon
